label: 制作実績
title: Projects
subtitle: Systems I have designed, built, and shipped — backend-first, end to end.

items.name: QuickLocal
items.description: A production-grade hyperlocal delivery platform backend. Distance-based fee engine, vendor free-delivery thresholds, PostGIS shop-search, transactional outbox for reliable events, and a Razorpay payment flow.

items.name: QuickLocal Mobile
items.description: The customer-facing app for QuickLocal — live order tracking on a map, location-aware shop feed, and a blue-themed design system with Reanimated + Lottie micro-interactions.

items.name: AI Helpdesk
items.description: An AI support module wired into the QuickLocal stack via OpenRouter free models — context-aware answers over orders, vendors, and delivery, with graceful fallbacks and rate limiting.

items.name: This Portfolio
items.description: The site you are reading — Next.js 16 + React 19 with raw WebGL shaders, a fluid cursor field, a GSAP dissolve reveal, a scroll-driven 3D katana, and clip-path choreography.
